## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss content strategy, community development, and video optimization for AI-like Growth and GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/vnGag_jrxVbWsQMxKREcdPxtxwF89QvY?tab=summary&timestamp=700.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Focus on creating a cohesive course structure and improving community experience](https://fathom.video/share/vnGag_jrxVbWsQMxKREcdPxtxwF89QvY?tab=summary&timestamp=1413.0)
  - [Prioritize thumbnail and title optimization to increase video engagement](https://fathom.video/share/vnGag_jrxVbWsQMxKREcdPxtxwF89QvY?tab=summary&timestamp=2938.0)
  - [Develop a clear content strategy with distinct visual identities for different content types](https://fathom.video/share/vnGag_jrxVbWsQMxKREcdPxtxwF89QvY?tab=summary&timestamp=2820.0)
  - [Explore hiring additional team members to drive content creation and community management](https://fathom.video/share/vnGag_jrxVbWsQMxKREcdPxtxwF89QvY?tab=summary&timestamp=1465.0)

## Topics

### Community Development

  - [Two key roles needed: community experience manager and content driver](https://fathom.video/share/vnGag_jrxVbWsQMxKREcdPxtxwF89QvY?tab=summary&timestamp=1465.0)
  - [Planning to create a comprehensive course as the anchor for community value](https://fathom.video/share/vnGag_jrxVbWsQMxKREcdPxtxwF89QvY?tab=summary&timestamp=1413.0)
  - [Developing a $12,000/year package (tentatively called "GrowthOS") to bundle community, product, and services](https://fathom.video/share/vnGag_jrxVbWsQMxKREcdPxtxwF89QvY?tab=summary&timestamp=2167.0)

### Content Strategy

  - [Four main content types: webinars/workshops, podcasts, build-in-public, and quick takes/opinions](https://fathom.video/share/vnGag_jrxVbWsQMxKREcdPxtxwF89QvY?tab=summary&timestamp=2589.0)
  - [Need to establish clear visual identities for each content type](https://fathom.video/share/vnGag_jrxVbWsQMxKREcdPxtxwF89QvY?tab=summary&timestamp=2820.0)
  - [Aim to increase content output, potentially to 10 videos per week](https://fathom.video/share/vnGag_jrxVbWsQMxKREcdPxtxwF89QvY?tab=summary&timestamp=3715.0)
  - [Explore using behind-the-scenes photos and concept images in thumbnails](https://fathom.video/share/vnGag_jrxVbWsQMxKREcdPxtxwF89QvY?tab=summary&timestamp=3072.0)

### Video Optimization

  - [Current thumbnail and title strategy not effectively conveying video quality](https://fathom.video/share/vnGag_jrxVbWsQMxKREcdPxtxwF89QvY?tab=summary&timestamp=3628.0)
  - [Need to brainstorm visual concepts before creating thumbnails](https://fathom.video/share/vnGag_jrxVbWsQMxKREcdPxtxwF89QvY?tab=summary&timestamp=3344.0)
  - [Consider hiring experts or consultants to improve thumbnail and title performance](https://fathom.video/share/vnGag_jrxVbWsQMxKREcdPxtxwF89QvY?tab=summary&timestamp=3480.0)
  - [Explore allowing team members more freedom in content clipping and publishing](https://fathom.video/share/vnGag_jrxVbWsQMxKREcdPxtxwF89QvY?tab=summary&timestamp=3715.0)

### Upcoming Projects

  - [Marcel to start recording course content on Thursday/Friday](https://fathom.video/share/vnGag_jrxVbWsQMxKREcdPxtxwF89QvY?tab=summary&timestamp=1783.0)
  - [Will and Brandon to focus on getting content "in the can" and iterating later](https://fathom.video/share/vnGag_jrxVbWsQMxKREcdPxtxwF89QvY?tab=summary&timestamp=1946.0)
  - [Jason working on a comprehensive strategy document to align all efforts](https://fathom.video/share/vnGag_jrxVbWsQMxKREcdPxtxwF89QvY?tab=summary&timestamp=828.0)

### AI Tools Integration

  - [Discussing the potential for a "build in public" series on replacing stock content with AI-generated assets](https://fathom.video/share/vnGag_jrxVbWsQMxKREcdPxtxwF89QvY?tab=summary&timestamp=2451.0)
  - [Highlighting how AI tools (like Suno V5 for music) are drastically reducing production time](https://fathom.video/share/vnGag_jrxVbWsQMxKREcdPxtxwF89QvY?tab=summary&timestamp=2558.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Will and Brandon to brainstorm and mock up thumbnail concepts before involving Mergrim](https://fathom.video/share/vnGag_jrxVbWsQMxKREcdPxtxwF89QvY?tab=summary&timestamp=3344.0)
  - [Jason to complete and share the comprehensive strategy document](https://fathom.video/share/vnGag_jrxVbWsQMxKREcdPxtxwF89QvY?tab=summary&timestamp=828.0)
  - [Team to focus on launching the workshop and getting course content recorded](https://fathom.video/share/vnGag_jrxVbWsQMxKREcdPxtxwF89QvY?tab=summary&timestamp=3768.0)
  - [Explore options for consulting with YouTube optimization experts](https://fathom.video/share/vnGag_jrxVbWsQMxKREcdPxtxwF89QvY?tab=summary&timestamp=3480.0)
  - [Continue iterating on thumbnail and title strategies to improve video performance](https://fathom.video/share/vnGag_jrxVbWsQMxKREcdPxtxwF89QvY?tab=summary&timestamp=3480.0)
